MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANDOVAL, SEBASTIAN SANDOVAL, ROSE SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-24-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. DEFENDANTS, MARCOS RIVERA AND NUEMY ALFARO HAVE VACATED THE PREMISES AT 3345 -18TH STREET, #4, SAN FRANCISCO. THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT IS FOR MONEY ONLY. THE COURT AWARDS PLAINTIFF, SEBASTIAN SANDOVAL, RENT AND DAMAGES OF $2500 FROM MARCOS RIVERA AND NUEMY ALFARO. DEFENDANTS RIVERA AND ALFARO SHALL PAY THIS AMOUNT IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $50.00. CREDITS FOR PAST PAYMENTS HAVE BEEN ALLOWED. THERE WILL NOT BE ANY EXECUTION ON THIS JUDGMENT AS LONG AS PAYMENTS ARE MAINTAINED. PAYMENTS WILL BEGIN ON 5-1-95 AND WILL BE DUE ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. UPON PAYMENT OF THE 2500 IN FULL, PLAINTIFF WILL DEEM THE JUDGMENT SATISFIED.
